words.hint: Machine that can perform tasks automatically
words.educational: Robots are programmable machines that can perform tasks. They're used in manufacturing, medicine, exploration, and daily life.

words.hint: Global network connecting millions of computers
words.educational: The Internet is a worldwide network that connects billions of devices, enabling communication, information sharing, and services globally.
Software consists of programs and data that tell computers what to do. Examples include operating systems, apps, and games.
Batteries convert chemical energy into electrical energy, powering portable devices. Lithium-ion batteries are now most common.
Wireless technology uses radio waves to transmit data. WiFi, Bluetooth, and cellular networks are wireless technologies.

words.hint: Device that detects and responds to input
words.educational: Sensors detect physical properties like temperature, light, or motion and convert them to signals. They're essential in modern devices.
Laptops are portable computers that integrate display, keyboard, and battery. They've revolutionized mobile computing.

words.hint: Device that produces text or images on paper
words.educational: Printers transfer digital documents to physical paper using various methods including inkjet and laser technology.

words.hint: Device for capturing images and videos
words.educational: Cameras record images using light sensors. Digital cameras have largely replaced film cameras in modern photography.

words.hint: Mobile device with advanced computing abilities
words.educational: Smartphones combine phone capabilities with powerful computers, cameras, and internet access, transforming communication and daily life.
